title: Show HN: The Alphabetical Clock
full_text:
The Accursèd Alphabetical Clock
 

This clock displays the current time alphabetically. It is inspired by this post on Mastodon.

In Three-Hand mode, the hours, minutes, and seconds are each independently sorted by their English spelling, with a hand for each.
In Combined mode, every possible time (43,200 of them) is spelled out, sorted alphabetically, and a single needle points to the current one.
